# Assignment Pull Request

## Student Details

Name:

Batch:

Assignment Day:

## Create the Correct Folder

Run this from the repository root before adding your answers:

```bash
python3 scripts/create_submission.py --day DAY --batch a --name your-name
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I created this branch from the latest `main`.
- [ ] This Pull Request contains exactly one assignment day.
- [ ] I added my solution inside my own folder.
- [ ] I used the correct batch folder.
- [ ] I did not edit another student's files.
- [ ] My file is named exactly `solution.py` with no extra spaces.
- [ ] I added every required CSV or chart file listed in `questions.md`.
- [ ] I tested my code before submitting.

## File Submitted

```txt
assignments/day-XX/submissions/batch-a/your-name/solution.py
```

After opening the Pull Request, confirm that the `assignment-structure` check
passes. Its error message tells you exactly which files need correction.
